summary: Delivered full /analytics page implementation spec covering layout, 3 visualization blocks (engagement overview, scoring distribution, vote reliability), empty states, interaction notes, and route handler sketch posted to OPN-168.
Built landing page redesign prototype (OPN-203 done) and topic detail redesign prototype (OPN-204 comment posted, checkout blocked by sibling run).

Delivered topic detail redesign prototype with 2-col above-fold layout, collapsed rounds via details/summary, score chips, rank cues, four page states, and full component spec; fixed design system violations (removed gradients, flattened border-radii).
Designed closed-topic editorial page prototype with score arcs, highlights, narrative beats, transcript overhaul, and active-topic fallback state
Audited MCP server tools vs simulator API flow and posted gap analysis covering authentication, multi-round contribution, voting, and report retrieval gaps.

Designed contribution selection algorithm spec: CSS formula, K=R+ceil(2.5*log2(N)) budget, Union-Find claim-overlap clustering, turning point detection, edge cases, and typed output format for narrative pipeline.
Woke to issue_assigned for OPN-238; task already done from prior heartbeat — contribution selection algorithm spec delivered, no new work required.
